segment.source: {VAR_SELECT, select, male {{VAR_PLURAL, plural, =0 { will not bring his dog} one { will bring his dog} other { will bring his dogs}} } female {{VAR_PLURAL_1, plural, =0 { will not bring her dog} one { will bring her dog} other { will bring her dogs}} } other {{VAR_PLURAL_2, plural, =0 {Nobody will bring a dog} one {Somebody will bring dog} other {Somebody will bring dogs}} }}
segment.target: {VAR_SELECT, select, male {{VAR_PLURAL, plural, =0 { will not bring his dog} one { will bring his dog} other { will bring his dogs}} } female {{VAR_PLURAL_1, plural, =0 { will not bring her dog} one { will bring her dog} other { will bring her dogs}} } other {{VAR_PLURAL_2, plural, =0 {Nobody will bring a dog} one {Somebody will bring dog} other {Somebody will bring dogs}} }
